entity.summary: Multichain decentralized trading protocol providing on-chain strategy automation including grid trading, DCA, rebalancing grids, order-book execution, market making, and AI-assisted trading workflows.
entity.notes: Current first-party DeltaTrade website and documentation identify a multichain decentralized trading protocol with fully on-chain strategies, grid trading, DCA, rebalancing, order-book functions, market making, and AI-powered strategies. DefiLlama independently reports current NEAR and Solana TVL and recent DEX volume.

evidence.title: DeltaTrade official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes the application and describes fully decentralized on-chain trading strategies, permissionless token support, and active product features.

evidence.title: Introduction to DeltaTrade
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies DeltaTrade as a multichain decentralized trading protocol and documents grid trading, DCA, rebalancing grids, multichain support, order-book execution, platform market making, and AI-powered strategies.

evidence.title: DeltaTrade metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry reports current TVL and recent DEX volume across NEAR and Solana and independently corroborates the multichain DEX identity.
